positive: A majestic, highly stylized celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) standing on a glowing, stylized crescent moon. The fox has an ethereal, powerful silhouette with multiple flowing, translucent tails that trail into swirling cosmic nebulae and gold stardust. The background is a deep midnight indigo, contrasting with vibrant pops of neon cyan, electric violet, and brilliant metallic gold accents. The composition is centered, focusing on the dramatic profile of the fox. Graphic novel style meets traditional Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print; high contrast, clean vector lines, smooth gradients, highly detailed, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: low quality, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry, artifacts, noise, grainy, realistic photo, photorealism, grayscale, messy, busy, disfigured
